query:
-- Extend sanad_offices with public marketplace fields
ALTER TABLE sanad_offices
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS is_public_listed TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS licence_number VARCHAR(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS licence_expiry DATE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS verified_at DATETIME,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS languages VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT 'Arabic,English',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS governorate VARCHAR(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS logo_url TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS description_ar TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS avg_rating DECIMAL(3,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS total_reviews INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS response_time_hours INT DEFAULT 24;

-- Service catalogue for each Sanad centre
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sanad_service_catalogue (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  office_id INT NOT NULL,
  service_type VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  service_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  service_name_ar VARCHAR(255),
  price_omr DECIMAL(10,3) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  processing_days INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 3,
  description TEXT,
  description_ar TEXT,
  is_active TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_ssc_office (office_id),
  INDEX idx_ssc_type (service_type),
  INDEX idx_ssc_active (is_active)
);

-- Incoming service requests from companies
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sanad_service_requests (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  office_id INT NOT NULL,
  requester_company_id INT,
  requester_user_id INT,
  service_type VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  service_catalogue_id INT,
  contact_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  contact_phone VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  contact_email VARCHAR(255),
  company_name VARCHAR(255),
  company_cr VARCHAR(100),
  message TEXT,
  status ENUM('new','contacted','in_progress','completed','declined') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'new',
  notes TEXT,
  created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_ssr_office (office_id),
  INDEX idx_ssr_status (status),
  INDEX idx_ssr_created (created_at)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ihzfUTY3fkQrUHE.881d021b3ccf --database Q4QjnxJVGSNRVMesYiE8Gm --execute

  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS is_public_listed TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,

-- Incoming service requests from companies

  company_cr VARCHAR(100),
  message TEXT,

  INDEX idx_ssr_office (office_id),
  INDEX idx_ssr_status (status),
  INDEX idx_ssr_created (created_at)
